texto: We should not be ashamed to acknowledge truth and to assimilate it from whatever source it comes to us, even if it is brought to us by former generations and foreign peoples. For him who seeks the truth there is nothing of higher value than truth itself; it never cheapens or debases him who reaches for it but ennobles and honors him.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Yaqub ibn Ishaq al-Kindi sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “We should not be ashamed to acknowledge truth and to assimilate it from whatever source it comes …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, verdade, truth, útil em momentos de reflexao.

For him who seeks the truth there is nothing of higher value than truth itself; it never cheapens or debases him who reaches for it but ennobles and honors him.
